entities.name: CROPLAND MAPPING
entities.description: The process of identifying and mapping croplands globally for agriculture monitoring and application

entities.name: MEASURES
entities.description: NASA project for Making Earth System Data Records for Use in Research Environments

entities.name: GFSAD
entities.description: Global food security-support analysis data project

entities.name: GFSAD CROPLAND EXTENT PRODUCT
entities.description: A 30-m global cropland product produced through the GFSAD project

entities.name: IN-SITU DATA
entities.description: Spatially distributed ground-truth data used for the development of cropland products

entities.name: CROPREF
entities.description: A web application designed to collect crowdsourced geoTagged cropland samples

entities.name: CROWDSOURCED GEOTAGGED CROPLAND SAMPLES
entities.description: Geo-referenced samples of croplands versus non-croplands collected via volunteers

entities.name: GEO-REFERENCED STATISTICAL DATA
entities.description: Statistical data linked to geographic coordinates available for query and download

entities.name: HIGH RESOLUTION SATELLITE IMAGERY
entities.description: Satellite imagery with spatial resolution ranging from sub-meter to 5-m

entities.name: GOOGLE EARTH
entities.description: A platform providing very high spatial resolution satellite imagery

entities.name: CROWDSOURCING
entities.description: A mechanism for collecting data from a network of volunteers to validate and improve spatial information

entities.name: GLOBAL REFERENCE DATASET
entities.description: A dataset used for validating 30 m-resolution global land-cover maps

entities.name: GFSAD30
entities.description: A project focused on 30 m-resolution global land-cover maps

relationships.description: CROPREF is used to collect crowdsourced geoTagged cropland samples
Crowdsourced samples are used to improve global cropland mapping
GFSAD produced the global 30-m cropland extent product
Lack of sufficient in-situ data contributed to errors in the GFSAD cropland extent product
CROPREF integrates very high spatial resolution satellite imagery
Google Earth provides the high resolution satellite imagery used by CROPREF
Crowdsourcing is the mechanism used to collect the samples
The global reference dataset was built for validating maps in the GFSAD30 project
CROPREF allows users to query and browse geo-referenced statistical data
